Current configuration:
!
ver 08.0.95rT211
!
stack unit 1
  module 1 icx7150-c10zp-poe-port-management-module
  module 2 icx7150-2-copper-port-20g-module
  module 3 icx7150-2-sfp-plus-port-20g-module
  stack-port 1/3/1
  stack-port 1/3/2
!
!
!
!
!
vlan 1 name DEFAULT-VLAN by port
!
vlan 20 name management by port
 tagged ethe 1/2/1 to 1/2/2 ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 untagged ethe 1/1/1 to 1/1/7
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
 multicast passive
!
vlan 30 name servers by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/1 to 1/1/2 ethe 1/2/1 to 1/2/2 ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!
vlan 40 name storage by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/1 to 1/1/2 ethe 1/2/1 to 1/2/2 ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!
vlan 50 name dmz by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/1 to 1/1/2 ethe 1/2/1 to 1/2/2 ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!
vlan 70 name iot by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/1 to 1/1/2 ethe 1/2/1 to 1/2/2 ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!
!
vlan 900 name ISP-primary by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/8 ethe 1/3/1
!
vlan 901 name ISP-secondary by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/8 ethe 1/3/1
!
vlan 902 name ISP-backup by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/8 ethe 1/3/1
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
aaa authentication web-server default local
aaa authentication login default local
enable aaa console
ip address 10.0.20.5 255.255.255.0
ip default-gateway 10.0.20.1
!
no telnet server
username admin password .....
!
!
!
!
!
!
manager registrar
!
manager port-list 987
!
!
interface ethernet 1/1/1
 port-name ap-floor1
!
interface ethernet 1/1/2
 port-name ap-floor2
!
interface ethernet 1/2/2
 port-name trunk to breakout
 spanning-tree 802-1w admin-pt2pt-mac
!
interface ethernet 1/3/1
 port-name "trunk to breakout"
 spanning-tree 802-1w admin-pt2pt-mac
!
interface ethernet 1/3/2
 port-name trunk to core
 spanning-tree 802-1w admin-pt2pt-mac
!
